Tests the behavior of multiplying Number.MAX_VALUE by -1.5 resulting in Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY.

# Purpose
This code is a single assertion test that checks the behavior of JavaScript's `Number` object when multiplying `Number.MAX_VALUE` by `-1.5`. The test verifies that the result is equal to `Number.NEGATIVE_INFINITY`. This assertion ensures that the JavaScript engine correctly handles arithmetic operations that result in values beyond the representable range of negative numbers. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific edge case in numerical operations.
